04271     }
04272 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04273   };
04274 
04276 
04281   class EMREXTTEXTOUTA : public METARECORD, ::EMREXTTEXTOUTA {
04282     PSTR string_a;
04283     int string_size;
04284 
04285     INT* dx_i;
04286   public:
04296     EMREXTTEXTOUTA ( const RECTL* bounds, DWORD graphicsMode, FLOAT xScale,
04297                      FLOAT yScale, const PEMRTEXT text, LPCSTR string,
04298                      const INT* dx )
04299     {
04300       emr.iType = EMR_EXTTEXTOUTA;
04301       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMREXTTEXTOUTA );
04302 
04303       rclBounds = *bounds;
04304 
04305       iGraphicsMode = graphicsMode;
04306       exScale = xScale;
04307       eyScale = yScale;
04308 
04309       emrtext = *text;
04310 
04311       string_size = ROUND_TO_LONG( emrtext.nChars );
04312 
04313       string_a = new CHAR[ string_size ];
04314 
04315       memset( string_a, 0, sizeof(CHAR) * string_size );
04316 
04317       for ( unsigned int i=0; i<emrtext.nChars; i++ )
04318         string_a[i] = *string++;
04319 
04320       emrtext.offString = emr.nSize;
04321       emr.nSize += string_size * sizeof(CHAR);
04322 #if 0
04323 /* 
04324 Test only - Problem: Windows requires this dx to be set - at least from 2K on
04325 but to calculate real dx values is hard 
04326 For pstoedit - this is "fixed" now by estimating dx in pstoedit
04327 */
04328       if ( !dx ) {
04329         int * dxn = new  int [string_size];
04330         for (unsigned int i=0; i < string_size; i++) dxn[i] = 10;
04331         dx = dxn;
04332       }
04333 #endif
04334 
04335       if ( dx ) {
04336 
04337         dx_i = new INT[ emrtext.nChars ];
04338 
04339         for ( unsigned int i=0; i<emrtext.nChars; i++ )
04340           dx_i[i] = *dx++;
04341 
04342         emrtext.offDx = emr.nSize;
04343         emr.nSize += emrtext.nChars * sizeof(INT);
04344       }
04345       else {
04346         emrtext.offDx = 0;
04347         dx_i = 0;
04348       }
04349     }
04354     EMREXTTEXTOUTA ( DATASTREAM& ds )
04355     {
04356       ds >> emr >> rclBounds >> iGraphicsMode >> exScale >> eyScale >> emrtext;
04357 
04358       if ( emrtext.offString != 0 ) {
04359         string_size = ROUND_TO_LONG( emrtext.nChars );
04360 
04361         string_a = new CHAR[ string_size ];
04362 
04363         memset( string_a, 0, sizeof(CHAR) * string_size );
04364 
04365         CHARSTR string( string_a, string_size );
04366 
04367         ds >> string;
04368       }
04369       else
04370         string_a = 0;
04371 
04372       if ( emrtext.offDx ) {
04373         dx_i = new INT[ emrtext.nChars ];
04374 
04375         INTARRAY dx_is( dx_i, emrtext.nChars );
04376 
04377         ds >> dx_is;
04378       }
04379       else
04380         dx_i = 0;
04381     }
04386     ~EMREXTTEXTOUTA ( )
04387     {
04388       if ( string_a ) delete[] string_a;
04389       if ( dx_i ) delete[] dx_i;
04390     }
04394     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04395     {
04396       ds << emr << rclBounds << iGraphicsMode << exScale << eyScale
04397          << emrtext << CHARSTR( string_a, string_size );
04398       if ( dx_i )
04399         ds << INTARRAY( dx_i, emrtext.nChars );
04400       return true;
04401     }
04405     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04411     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* /*source*/, HDC dc ) const
04412     {
04413       RECT rect;
04414       rect.left = emrtext.rcl.left;
04415       rect.top = emrtext.rcl.top;
04416       rect.right = emrtext.rcl.right;
04417       rect.bottom = emrtext.rcl.bottom;
04418 
04419       ExtTextOutA( dc, emrtext.ptlReference.x, emrtext.ptlReference.y,
04420                    emrtext.fOptions, &rect, string_a, emrtext.nChars,
04421                    dx_i );
04422     }
04423 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04424 
04427     void edit ( void ) const
04428     {
04429       printf( "*EXTTEXTOUTA*\n" );
04430       edit_rectl( "rclBounds", rclBounds );
04431       printf( "\tiGraphicsMode\t: " );
04432       switch ( iGraphicsMode ) {
04433       case GM_COMPATIBLE: printf( "GM_COMPATIBLE\n" ); break;
04434       case GM_ADVANCED: printf( "GM_ADVANCED\n" ); break;
04435       default: printf( "unknown(%ld)\n", iGraphicsMode );
04436       }
04437       printf( "\texScale\t\t: %f\n", exScale );
04438       printf( "\teyScale\t\t: %f\n", eyScale );
04439       printf( "\tptlReference\t: (%ld,%ld)\n", emrtext.ptlReference.x,
04440               emrtext.ptlReference.y );
04441       printf( "\tnChars\t\t: %ld\n", emrtext.nChars );
04442       printf( "\toffString\t: %ld\n", emrtext.offString );
04443       printf( "\tfOptions\t: " );
04444       if ( emrtext.fOptions == 0 )
04445         printf( "None" );
04446       else {
04447         if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_GRAYED ) {
04448           printf( "ETO_GRAYED" );
04449           if ( emrtext.fOptions & ~ETO_GRAYED )
04450             printf( " | " );
04451         }
04452         if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_OPAQUE ) {
04453           printf( "ETO_OPAQUE" );
04454           if ( emrtext.fOptions & ~(ETO_GRAYED | ETO_OPAQUE) )
04455             printf( " | " );
04456         }
04457         if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_CLIPPED ) {
04458           printf( "ETO_CLIPPED" );
04459           if ( emrtext.fOptions & ~(ETO_GRAYED | ETO_OPAQUE | ETO_CLIPPED ) )
04460             printf( " | " );
04461         }
04462         if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_GLYPH_INDEX ) {
04463           printf( "ETO_GLYPH_INDEX" );
04464           if ( emrtext.fOptions &
04465                ~(ETO_GRAYED | ETO_OPAQUE | ETO_CLIPPED | ETO_GLYPH_INDEX) )
04466             printf( " | " );
04467         }
04468         if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_RTLREADING ) {
04469           printf( "ETO_RTLREADING" );
04470           if ( emrtext.fOptions &
04471                ~(ETO_GRAYED | ETO_OPAQUE | ETO_CLIPPED | ETO_GLYPH_INDEX |
04472                  ETO_RTLREADING) )
04473             printf( " | " );
04474         }
04475         if ( emrtext.fOptions & ETO_IGNORELANGUAGE )
04476           printf( "ETO_IGNORELANGUAGE" );
04477       }
04478       printf( "\n" );
04479       edit_rectl( "rcl\t", emrtext.rcl );
04480       printf( "\toffDx\t\t: %ld\n", emrtext.offDx );
04481       printf( "\tString:\n\t\t%s\n",  string_a );
04482 
04483       if ( emrtext.offDx != 0 ) {
04484         printf( "\tOffsets:\n\t\t" );
04485         for ( unsigned int i = 0; i < emrtext.nChars; i++ )
04486           printf( "%d ", dx_i[i] );
04487         printf( "\n" );
04488       }
04489     }
04490 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04491   };
04492 
04494 
04497   class EMRSETPIXELV : public METARECORD, ::EMRSETPIXELV {
04498   public:
04504     EMRSETPIXELV ( INT x, INT y, COLORREF color )
04505     {
04506       emr.iType = EMR_SETPIXELV;
04507       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRSETPIXELV );
04508       ptlPixel.x = x;
04509       ptlPixel.y = y;
04510       crColor = color;
04511     }
04516     EMRSETPIXELV ( DATASTREAM& ds )
04517     {
04518       ds >> emr >> ptlPixel >> crColor;
04519     }
04523     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04524     {
04525       ds << emr << ptlPixel << crColor;
04526       return true;
04527     }
04531     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04537     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* /*source*/, HDC dc ) const
04538     {
04539       SetPixel( dc, ptlPixel.x, ptlPixel.y, crColor );
04540     }
04541 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04542 
04545     void edit ( void ) const
04546     {
04547       printf( "*SETPIXELV*\n" );
04548       edit_pointl( "ptlPixel", ptlPixel );
04549       edit_color( "crColor\t", crColor );
04550     }
04551 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04552   };
04553 
04554   class PEN;
04555   class EXTPEN;
04556   class BRUSH;
04557   class FONT;
04558   class PALETTE;
04559 
04561 
04564   class EMRCREATEPEN : public METARECORD, public ::EMRCREATEPEN
04565   {
04566   public:
04571     EMRCREATEPEN ( PEN* pen, HGDIOBJ handle );
04576     EMRCREATEPEN ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04580     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04581     {
04582       ds << emr << ihPen << lopn;
04583       return true;
04584     }
04588     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04594     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04595 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04596 
04599     void edit ( void ) const
04600     {
04601       printf( "*CREATEPEN*\n" );
04602       printf( "\tihPen\t\t: 0x%lx\n", ihPen );
04603       edit_pen_style( "lopn.lopnStyle", lopn.lopnStyle );
04604       printf( "\tlopn.lopnWidth\t: %ld, %ld\n", lopn.lopnWidth.x, lopn.lopnWidth.y );
04605       edit_color( "lopn.lopnColor", lopn.lopnColor );
04606     }
04607 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04608   };
04609 
04611 
04615   class EMREXTCREATEPEN : public METARECORD, public ::EMREXTCREATEPEN
04616   {
04617   public:
04622     EMREXTCREATEPEN ( EXTPEN* pen, HGDIOBJ handle );
04627     EMREXTCREATEPEN ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04631     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04632     {
04633       ds << emr << ihPen << offBmi << cbBmi << offBits << cbBits << elp;
04634       return true;
04635     }
04639     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04645     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04646 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04647 
04650     void edit ( void ) const
04651     {
04652       printf( "*EXTCREATEPEN*\n" );
04653       printf( "\tihPen\t\t\t: 0x%lx\n", ihPen );
04654       printf( "\toffBmi\t\t\t: %ld\n",  offBmi );
04655       printf( "\tcbBmi\t\t\t: %ld\n", cbBmi );
04656       printf( "\toffBits\t\t\t: %ld\n", offBits );
04657       printf( "\tcbBits\t\t\t: %ld\n", cbBits );
04658       edit_pen_style( "elp.elpPenStyle\t", elp.elpPenStyle );
04659       printf( "\telp.elpWidth\t\t: %ld\n", elp.elpWidth );
04660       edit_brush_style( "elp.elpBrushStyle", elp.elpBrushStyle );
04661       edit_color( "elp.elpColor\t", elp.elpColor );
04662       edit_brush_hatch( "elp.elpHatch\t", elp.elpHatch );
04663       printf( "\telp.elpNumEntries\t: %ld\n", elp.elpNumEntries );
04664     }
04665 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04666   };
04667 
04669 
04672   class EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT : public METARECORD, public ::EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT
04673   {
04674   public:
04679     EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT ( BRUSH* brush, HGDIOBJ handle );
04684     EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04688     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04689     {
04690       ds << emr << ihBrush << lb;
04691       return true;
04692     }
04696     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04702     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04703 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04704 
04707     void edit ( void ) const
04708     {
04709       printf( "*CREATEBRUSHINDIRECT*\n" );
04710       printf( "\tihBrush\t\t: 0x%lx\n", ihBrush );
04711       edit_brush_style( "lb.lbStyle", lb.lbStyle );
04712       edit_color( "lb.lbColor", lb.lbColor );
04713       edit_brush_hatch( "lb.lbHatch", lb.lbHatch );
04714     }
04715 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04716   };
04717 
04719 
04722   class EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW : public METARECORD, public ::EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW
04723   {
04724   public:
04729     EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW ( FONT* font, HGDIOBJ handle );
04734     EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04738     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04739     {
04740       // Since EMF records have to be multiples of 4 bytes, this
04741       // should perhaps be a general thing, but we know it's currently
04742       // only a problem for this structure.
04743 
04744       ds << emr << ihFont << elfw << PADDING( 2 );
04745 
04746       return true;
04747     }
04751     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04757     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04758 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04759 
04762     void edit ( void ) const
04763     {
04764       printf( "*EXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW*\n" );
04765       printf( "\tihFont\t\t\t: %ld\n", ihFont );
04766       printf( "\tlfHeight\t\t: %ld\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfHeight );
04767       printf( "\tlfWidth\t\t\t: %ld\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfWidth );
04768       printf( "\tlfEscapement\t\t: %ld\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfEscapement );
04769       printf( "\tlfOrientation\t\t: %ld\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfOrientation );
04770       printf( "\tlfWeight\t\t: " );
04771       switch ( elfw.elfLogFont.lfWeight ) {
04772       case FW_DONTCARE: printf( "FW_DONTCARE\n" ); break;
04773       case FW_THIN: printf( "FW_THIN\n" ); break;
04774       case FW_EXTRALIGHT: printf( "FW_EXTRALIGHT\n" ); break;
04775       case FW_LIGHT: printf( "FW_LIGHT\n" ); break;
04776       case FW_NORMAL: printf( "FW_NORMAL\n" ); break;
04777       case FW_MEDIUM: printf( "FW_MEDIUM\n" ); break;
04778       case FW_SEMIBOLD: printf( "FW_SEMIBOLD\n" ); break;
04779       case FW_BOLD: printf( "FW_BOLD\n" ); break;
04780       case FW_EXTRABOLD: printf( "FW_EXTRABOLD\n" ); break;
04781       case FW_BLACK: printf( "FW_BLACK\n" ); break;
04782       }
04783       printf( "\tlfItalic\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfItalic );
04784       printf( "\tlfUnderline\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfUnderline );
04785       printf( "\tlfStrikeOut\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfStrikeOut );
04786       printf( "\tlfCharSet\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfCharSet );
04787       printf( "\tlfOutPrecision\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfOutPrecision );
04788       printf( "\tlfClipPrecision\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfClipPrecision );
04789       printf( "\tlfQuality\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfQuality );
04790       printf( "\tlfPitchAndFamily\t: %d\n", elfw.elfLogFont.lfPitchAndFamily );
04791       int i = 0;
04792       printf( "\tlfFaceName\t\t: '" );
04793       while ( elfw.elfLogFont.lfFaceName[i] != 0 && i < LF_FACESIZE ) {
04794         putchar( elfw.elfLogFont.lfFaceName[i] );
04795         i++;
04796       }
04797       puts( "'" );
04798 
04799       i = 0;
04800       printf( "\telfFullName\t\t: '" );
04801       while ( elfw.elfFullName[i] != 0 && i < LF_FULLFACESIZE ) {
04802         putchar( elfw.elfFullName[i] );
04803         i++;
04804       }
04805       puts( "'" );
04806 
04807       i = 0;
04808       printf( "\telfStyle\t\t: '" );
04809       while ( elfw.elfStyle[i] != 0 && i < LF_FACESIZE ) {
04810         putchar( elfw.elfStyle[i] );
04811         i++;
04812       }
04813       puts( "'" );
04814 
04815       printf( "\telfVersion\t\t: %ld\n", elfw.elfVersion );
04816       printf( "\telfStyleSize\t\t: %ld\n", elfw.elfStyleSize );
04817       printf( "\telfMatch\t\t: %ld\n", elfw.elfMatch );
04818       printf( "\telfVendorId\t\t: '%s'\n", elfw.elfVendorId );
04819       printf( "\telfCulture\t\t: %ld\n", elfw.elfCulture );
04820       printf( "\telfPanose\t\t:\n" );
04821       printf( "\t\tbFamilyType\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bFamilyType );
04822       printf( "\t\tbSerifStyle\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bSerifStyle );
04823       printf( "\t\tbWeight\t\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bWeight );
04824       printf( "\t\tbProportion\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bProportion );
04825       printf( "\t\tbContrast\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bContrast );
04826       printf( "\t\tbStrokeVariation\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bStrokeVariation );
04827       printf( "\t\tbArmStyle\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bArmStyle );
04828       printf( "\t\tbLetterform\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bLetterform );
04829       printf( "\t\tbMidline\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bMidline );
04830       printf( "\t\tbXHeight\t\t: %d\n", elfw.elfPanose.bXHeight );
04831     }
04832 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04833   };
04834 
04836 
04839   class EMRCREATEPALETTE : public METARECORD, public ::EMRCREATEPALETTE
04840   {
04841   public:
04846     EMRCREATEPALETTE ( PALETTE* palette, HGDIOBJ handle );
04851     EMRCREATEPALETTE ( DATASTREAM& ds );
04855     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04856     {
04857       ds << emr << ihPal << lgpl;
04858       return true;
04859     }
04863     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04869     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* source, HDC dc ) const;
04870 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04871 
04874     void edit ( void ) const
04875     {
04876       printf( "*CREATEPALETTE* (not really handled by libEMF)\n" );
04877     }
04878 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04879   };
04880 
04882 
04885   class EMRFILLPATH : public METARECORD, ::EMRFILLPATH {
04886   public:
04891     EMRFILLPATH ( const RECTL* bounds )
04892     {
04893       emr.iType = EMR_FILLPATH;
04894       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRFILLPATH );
04895       rclBounds = *bounds;
04896     }
04901     EMRFILLPATH ( DATASTREAM& ds )
04902     {
04903       ds >> emr >> rclBounds;
04904     }
04908     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
04909     {
04910       ds << emr << rclBounds;
04911       return true;
04912     }
04916     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
04922     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* /*source*/, HDC dc ) const
04923     {
04924       FillPath( dc );
04925     }
04926 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
04927 
04930     void edit ( void ) const
04931     {
04932       printf( "*FILLPATH*\n" );
04933       edit_rectl( "rclBounds", rclBounds );
04934     }
04935 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
04936   };

05266   class EMRRESTOREDC : public METARECORD, ::EMRRESTOREDC {
05267   public:

05272     {
05273       emr.iType = EMR_RESTOREDC;
05274       emr.nSize = sizeof( ::EMRRESTOREDC );
05275       iRelative = n;
05276     }
05281     EMRRESTOREDC ( DATASTREAM& ds )
05282     {
05283       ds >> emr >> iRelative;
05284     }
05288     bool serialize ( DATASTREAM ds )
05289     {
05290       ds << emr << iRelative;
05291       return true;
05292     }
05296     int size ( void ) const { return emr.nSize; }
05302     void execute ( METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT* /*source*/, HDC dc ) const
05303     {
05304       RestoreDC( dc, iRelative );
05305     }
05306 #ifdef ENABLE_EDITING
05307 
05310     void edit ( void ) const
05311     {
05312       printf( "*RESTOREDC*\n" );
05313       printf( "\tiRelative: %ld\n", iRelative );
05314     }
05315 #endif /* ENABLE_EDITING */
05316   };

05375   class PEN : public GRAPHICSOBJECT, public LOGPEN {
05376   public:
05380     PEN ( const LOGPEN* lpen )
05381     {
05382       lopnStyle = lpen->lopnStyle;
05383       lopnWidth = lpen->lopnWidth;
05384       lopnColor = lpen->lopnColor;
05385     }
05389     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_PEN; }
05396     METARECORD* newEMR ( HDC dc, HGDIOBJ emf_handle )
05397     {
05398       contexts[dc] = emf_handle;
05399       return new EMRCREATEPEN( this, emf_handle );
05400     }
05401   };
05402 
05404 
05407   class EXTPEN : public GRAPHICSOBJECT, public EXTLOGPEN {
05408   public:
05412     EXTPEN ( const EXTLOGPEN* lpen )
05413     {
05414       elpPenStyle = lpen->elpPenStyle;
05415       elpWidth = lpen->elpWidth;
05416       elpBrushStyle = lpen->elpBrushStyle;
05417       elpColor = lpen->elpColor;
05418       elpHatch = lpen->elpHatch;
05419       elpNumEntries = 0;
05420       elpStyleEntry[0] = 0;
05421     }
05425     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_EXTPEN; }
05432     METARECORD* newEMR ( HDC dc, HGDIOBJ emf_handle )
05433     {
05434       contexts[dc] = emf_handle;
05435       return new EMREXTCREATEPEN( this, emf_handle );
05436     }
05437   };
05438 
05440 
05443   class BRUSH : public GRAPHICSOBJECT, public LOGBRUSH {
05444   public:
05448     BRUSH ( const LOGBRUSH* lbrush )
05449     {
05450       lbStyle = lbrush->lbStyle;
05451       lbColor = lbrush->lbColor;
05452       lbHatch = lbrush->lbHatch;
05453     }
05457     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_BRUSH; }
05464     METARECORD* newEMR ( HDC dc, HGDIOBJ emf_handle )
05465     {
05466       contexts[dc] = emf_handle;
05467       return new EMRCREATEBRUSHINDIRECT( this, emf_handle );
05468     }
05469   };
05470 
05472 
05475   class FONT : public GRAPHICSOBJECT, public EXTLOGFONTW {
05476   public:
05480     FONT ( const LOGFONTW* lfont )
05481     {
05482       this->elfLogFont = *lfont;
05483       // There are a lot more entries in the EXTLOGFONTW structure than
05484       // the API has values for, so we invent them here
05485       memset( &elfFullName, 0, sizeof elfFullName );
05486       memset( &elfStyle, 0, sizeof elfStyle );
05487       elfVersion = ELF_VERSION;
05488       elfStyleSize = 0;
05489       elfMatch = 0;
05490       elfReserved = 0;
05491       memset( &elfVendorId, 0, sizeof elfVendorId );
05492       elfCulture = ELF_CULTURE_LATIN;
05493       memset( &elfPanose, 1, sizeof(PANOSE) );
05494     }
05498     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_FONT; }
05505     METARECORD* newEMR ( HDC dc, HGDIOBJ emf_handle )
05506     {
05507       contexts[dc] = emf_handle;
05508       return new EMREXTCREATEFONTINDIRECTW( this, emf_handle );
05509     }
05510   };
05511 
05513 
05516   class PALETTE : public GRAPHICSOBJECT, public LOGPALETTE {
05517   public:
05521     PALETTE ( const LOGPALETTE* lpalette )
05522     {
05523       (void)lpalette;
05524       palVersion = 0;
05525       palNumEntries = 0;
05526       PALETTEENTRY zero_entry = { 0, 0, 0, 0 };
05527       palPalEntry[0] = zero_entry;
05528     }
05532     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_PALETTE; }
05539     METARECORD* newEMR ( HDC dc, HGDIOBJ emf_handle )
05540     {
05541       contexts[dc] = emf_handle;
05542       return new EMRCREATEPALETTE( this, emf_handle );
05543     }
05544   };
05545 
05547 
05553   class METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT : public OBJECT {
05561     void init ( const RECT* size, LPCWSTR description_w ) {
05562 
05563       // Evidently, metafile handles are numbered from 1, so don't
05564       // ever use 0.
05565 
05566       handles.push_back( true );
05567 
05568       // Keep some of our graphics state in a header record
05569 
05570       header = new ENHMETAHEADER ( description_w );
05571       records.push_back( header );
05572 
05573       // Compute the size and position of the metafile on the "page"
05574 
05575       if ( size ) {
05576         update_frame = false;
05577 
05578         header->rclFrame.left = size->left;
05579         header->rclFrame.top = size->top;
05580         header->rclFrame.right = size->right;
05581         header->rclFrame.bottom = size->bottom;
05582 
05583         header->rclBounds.left =
05584           size->left * header->szlDevice.cx / ( header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 );
05585         header->rclBounds.top =
05586           size->top * header->szlDevice.cy / ( header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 );
05587         header->rclBounds.right =
05588           size->right * header->szlDevice.cx / ( header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 );
05589         header->rclBounds.bottom =
05590           size->bottom * header->szlDevice.cy / ( header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 );
05591       }
05592       else {
05593         update_frame = true;
05594 
05595         header->rclBounds.left = -10;
05596         header->rclBounds.top = -10;
05597         header->rclBounds.right = 10;
05598         header->rclBounds.bottom = 10;
05599 
05600         header->rclFrame.left = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.left *
05601           header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
05602         header->rclFrame.top = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.top *
05603           header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
05604         header->rclFrame.right = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.right *
05605           header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
05606         header->rclFrame.bottom = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.bottom *
05607           header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
05608       }
05609 
05610       // Some default graphics state (are they really, though?)
05611 
05612       SIZEL default_resolution = { RESOLUTION, RESOLUTION };
05613       resolution = default_resolution;
05614       SIZEL default_viewport_ext = { 1, 1 };
05615       viewport_ext = default_viewport_ext;
05616       POINT default_viewport_org = { 0, 0 };
05617       viewport_org = default_viewport_org;
05618       SIZEL default_window_ext = { 1, 1 };
05619       window_ext = default_window_ext;
05620       POINT default_window_org = { 0, 0 };
05621       window_org = default_window_org;
05622 
05623       min_device_point = viewport_org;
05624       max_device_point = viewport_org;
05625 
05626       pen = (PEN*)globalObjects.find( BLACK_PEN | ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT );
05627       brush = (BRUSH*)globalObjects.find( BLACK_BRUSH | ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT );
05628       font = (FONT*)globalObjects.find( DEVICE_DEFAULT_FONT | ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT);
05629       palette = (PALETTE*)globalObjects.find( DEFAULT_PALETTE|ENHMETA_STOCK_OBJECT);
05630 
05631       text_alignment = TA_BASELINE;
05632       text_color = RGB(0,0,0);
05633       bk_color = RGB(0xff,0xff,0xff);
05634       bk_mode = OPAQUE;
05635       polyfill_mode = ALTERNATE;
05636       map_mode = MM_TEXT;
05637 
05638       handle = globalObjects.add( this );
05639     }
05640 
05641   public:
05645     ::FILE* fp;
05650     DATASTREAM ds;
05654     ENHMETAHEADER* header;
05658     std::vector< EMF::METARECORD* > records;
05659 
05660     // Keep a small set of graphics state information
05661     SIZEL resolution;           
05662     SIZEL viewport_ext;         
05663     POINT viewport_org;         
05664     SIZEL window_ext;           
05665     POINT window_org;           
05666     bool update_frame;          
05667     POINT min_device_point;     
05668     POINT max_device_point;     
05669     POINT point;                
05670     PEN* pen;                   
05671     BRUSH* brush;               
05672     FONT* font;                 
05673     PALETTE* palette;           
05674     UINT text_alignment;        
05675     COLORREF text_color;        
05676     COLORREF bk_color;          
05677     INT bk_mode;                
05678     INT polyfill_mode;          
05679     INT map_mode;               
05680 
05686     std::vector< bool > handles;
05687 
05693     std::map< HGDIOBJ, HGDIOBJ > emf_handles;
05694 
05705       METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT ( FILE* fp_, const RECT* size,
05706                               LPCWSTR description_w )
05707         : fp(fp_), ds( fp_ )
05708     {
05709           init( size, description_w );
05710     }
05715     virtual ~METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT ( )
05716     {
05717       // Purge all the metarecords (if there are any) {this include the
05718       // header record, too}
05719       if ( records.size() > 0 )
05720         deleteMetafile();
05721     }
05725     OBJECTTYPE getType ( void ) const { return O_METAFILEDEVICECONTEXT; }
05730     DWORD nextHandle ( void )
05731     {
05732       for ( unsigned int i = 1; i < handles.size(); i++ ) {
05733         if ( !handles[i] ) {
05734           handles[i] = true;
05735           return i;
05736         }
05737       }
05738       handles.push_back( true );
05739       // Well, it appears that even StockObject handles count for something.
05740       // Not sure what the right value here is, then.
05741       header->nHandles = handles.size();
05742       return handles.size()-1;
05743     }
05747     void clearHandle ( DWORD handle )
05748     {
05749       handles[handle] = false;
05750     }
05756     void appendRecord ( METARECORD* record )
05757     {
05758       records.push_back( record );
05759 
05760       header->nBytes += record->size();
05761       header->nRecords++;
05762     }
05768     void appendHandle ( METARECORD* record )
05769     {
05770       records.push_back( record );
05771 
05772       header->nBytes += record->size();
05773       header->nRecords++;
05774     }
05779     void deleteMetafile ( void )
05780     {
05781       for ( std::vector<METARECORD*>::const_iterator r = records.begin();
05782             r != records.end();
05783             r++ ) {
05784         delete *r;
05785       }
05786       records.clear();
05787     }
05792     void mergePoint ( const LONG& x, const LONG& y )
05793     {
05794       POINT p;
05795       p.x = x;
05796       p.y = y;
05797       mergePoint( p );
05798     }
05803     void mergePoint( const POINT& p )
05804     {
05805       POINT device_point;
05806 
05807       // *** Note, it's possible for the global transformation matrix to
05808       // affect this too. ***
05809 
05810       device_point.x = (LONG)( (float)( p.x - window_org.x ) / window_ext.cx *
05811         viewport_ext.cx + viewport_org.x );
05812 
05813       device_point.y = (LONG)( (float)( p.y - window_org.y ) / window_ext.cy *
05814         viewport_ext.cy + viewport_org.y );
05815 
05816       // If the user didn't specify a bounding rectangle in the constructor,
05817       // compute one from this data, too.
05818       if ( device_point.x < min_device_point.x ) {
05819         min_device_point.x = device_point.x;
05820         if ( update_frame ) {
05821           header->rclBounds.left = min_device_point.x - 10;
05822           header->rclFrame.left = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.left *
05823             header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
05824         }
05825       }
05826       else if ( device_point.x > max_device_point.x ) {
05827         max_device_point.x = device_point.x;
05828         if ( update_frame ) {
05829           header->rclBounds.right = max_device_point.x + 10;
05830           header->rclFrame.right = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.right *
05831             header->szlMillimeters.cx * 100 / header->szlDevice.cx );
05832         }
05833       }
05834 
05835       if ( device_point.y < min_device_point.y ) {
05836         min_device_point.y = device_point.y;
05837         if ( update_frame ) {
05838           header->rclBounds.top = min_device_point.y - 10;
05839           header->rclFrame.top = (LONG)floor( (float)header->rclBounds.top *
05840             header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
05841         }
05842       }
05843       else if ( device_point.y > max_device_point.y ) {
05844         max_device_point.y = device_point.y;
05845         if ( update_frame ) {
05846           header->rclBounds.bottom = max_device_point.y + 10;
05847           header->rclFrame.bottom = (LONG)ceil( (float)header->rclBounds.bottom *
05848             header->szlMillimeters.cy * 100 / header->szlDevice.cy );
05849         }
05850       }
05851     }
05852   };
05853 
05854 } // close EMF namespace
05855 
05856 #endif /* _LIBEMF_H */
